nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 鹳科
nodes.summary: 鹳科（Ciconiidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联17种鸟类，如钳嘴鹳、非洲秃鹳、Greater adjutant等17种鸟类。

nodes.name: 禿鸛
nodes.summary: 禿鸛（Lesser adjutant，学名 Leptoptilos javanicus），分类上属于鹳形目，并归入鹳科，在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，常见栖息地包括海岸湿地、湿地，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力。
nodes.shortSummary: 秃鹳（台湾作小禿鸛）（学名：Leptoptilos javanicus），是鹳形目鹳科的一种鸟类。 特征 秃鹳体重约4650.99克，翼长约624.6毫米，嘴峰长约280.5毫米，喙宽度约37.5毫米，喙厚度约59.7毫米，跗蹠长约249.6毫米，尾长约277.2毫米。秃鹳是部…

nodes.name: 秃鹳
nodes.summary: 秃鹳（Leptoptilos javanicus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如禿鸛。

nodes.name: 秃鹳属
nodes.summary: 秃鹳属（Leptoptilos）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如非洲秃鹳、Greater adjutant、禿鸛。

nodes.name: 鹳形目
nodes.summary: 鹳形目（Ciconiiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联17种鸟类，如钳嘴鹳、非洲秃鹳、Greater adjutant等17种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 海岸湿地
nodes.summary: 海湾、泻湖、盐沼与河口组成的复合湿地。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: thumb|In Sri Lanka The lesser adjutant is often found in large rivers and lakes inside well wooded regions, in freshwater wetlands in agricultural areas, and coastal wetlands including mudflats and mangroves.{{Cite journal|last1=Subaraj|first1=R.|last2=Lok|first2=A

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: thumb|In Sri Lanka The lesser adjutant is often found in large rivers and lakes inside well wooded regions, in freshwater wetlands in agricultural areas, and coastal wetlands including mudflats and mangroves.{{Cite journal|last1=Subaraj|first1=R.|last2=Lok|first2=A

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Lesser adjutants were downlisted from Vulnerable to Near Threatened by the IUCN in 2023, due to community efforts to protect their nests and an expected slowing of population declines. In Nepal, lesser adjutants appear to be more adaptable to human habituation than their congenerics (e.g., Asian openbills), given that some wetland habitats are retained. While lesser adjutants appear to breed successfully in agricultural land, they are threatened by increasing urbanization, and the loss of tree species they prefer to nest in, such as Bombax ceiba, Haldina cordifolia, and Ficus religiosa. Like many other large waterbirds, the southeast Asian populations of lesser adjutant storks appear to be greatly at risk due to a combination of hunting and habitat destruction.{{Cite book |last=Goes |first=F

While lesser adjutants appear to breed successfully in agricultural land, they are threatened by increasing urbanization, and the loss of tree species they prefer to nest in, such as Bombax ceiba, Haldina cordifolia, and Ficus religiosa.
